name: Crocodile Garments Limited
summary: Crocodile Garments Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture, retail, and wholesale of garments and related accessories in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company operates in three segments: Garment and Related Accessories Business, Property Investment and Letting Business, and Trading of Securities. It offers menswear, ladies wear, children's clothing, including shirts, tees and polos, sweaters and knitwear, outerwear, pants, roomwear, and underwear; and accessories, such as bags and wallets, belts, shoes, scarves, socks, ties, and umbrellas, as well as distributes LACOSTE branded apparel. As of July 31, 2019, the company operated 21 shops under the Crocodile brand and 6 shops under the Lacoste brand in Hong Kong and Macau, as well as 13 shops, including 5 self-operated and 8 franchisee operated shops in Mainland China. Crocodile Garments Limited also sells its products through CROCODILE online shop and other e-channels. In addition, it is involved in the property investment and letting, and trading of securities. The company was is based in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong. Crocodile Garments Limited is a subsidiary of Rich Promise Limited.
